goals.title: README and future-trading gate documentation
goals.objective: Create README.md and docs/future-live-trading-gate.md that document local setup, tests, CSV schema, CLI usage, report interpretation, and the explicit no-live-trading/no-broker boundary.

goals.title: Deterministic example data and sample reports
goals.objective: Create examples/data/sample_ohlcv.csv and committed examples/reports/moving-average-report.{md,json} generated by the current CLI from local data only.

goals.title: Examples and docs regression tests
goals.objective: Add tests proving committed example JSON is reproducible from the CLI after normalizing only path-dependent fields and docs preserve no-live-trading safety statements.

goals.title: Full local verification
goals.objective: Run pytest, ruff, mypy, compileall, tabnanny, CLI sample regeneration, and static safety checks with no new dependencies and no broker/network/credential/order pathways.

goals.title: Final cleanup, independent review, and checkpoint
goals.objective: Run a bounded cleanup/no-op review on changed files, rerun verification, obtain independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR, and checkpoint final Ultragoal completion.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json for the offline MVP productization follow-up, preserving no-live-trading/no-broker/no-network/no-credentials constraints and using .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
